hooks.command: FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(tsx|jsx|css|scss)$'; then HITS=$(grep -n '#[0-9a-fA-F]\{3,8\}' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null | head -3); if [ -n "$HITS" ]; then echo '[react-craft] Potential hardcoded colors:'; echo "$HITS"; echo 'Consider running /react-craft:audit'; fi; fi
FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(tsx|jsx)$'; then echo '[react-craft] New UI file created: '"$FILE"; echo 'Run /react-craft:audit to validate DS compliance.'; fi

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND" | grep -q 'git commit'; then UI_FILES=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.(tsx|jsx|css|scss)$' | head -5); if [ -n "$UI_FILES" ]; then echo '[react-craft] UI files in commit:'; echo "$UI_FILES"; echo 'Run /react-craft:audit for DS compliance.'; fi; fi
